name: Production - Task Inactivity (no update for 3 days) copy

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id            AS task_id,
  t.title         AS task_title,
  t.description,
  t.status,
  t.priority,
  t.target_date,
  t.created_at    AS task_created_at,
  t.updated_at    AS last_updated_at,
  t.parent_id     AS parent_id,

  -- Task Owner
  rp.id           AS owner_id,
  rp.firstname    AS owner_first_name,
  rp.lastname     AS owner_last_name,
  rp.email        AS owner_email,

  -- Milestone (optional)
  m.id            AS milestone_id,
  m.title         AS milestone_title,

  -- Project
  pm.id           AS project_id,
  pm.title        AS project_title,

  -- Project Manager
  pmo.id          AS manager_id,
  pmo.firstname   AS manager_first_name,
  pmo.lastname    AS manager_last_name,
  pmo.email       AS manager_email,

  -- Observers (aggregated)
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.id) AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.firstname) AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.lastname) AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.email) AS observer_emails

FROM task_managements t

-- Task Owner
JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = t.responsible_person_id

-- Project
JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

-- Project Manager
JOIN spree_users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

-- Milestone (optional)
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = t.milestone_id

-- Observers
LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = t.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  t.status IN ('open', 'in_progress', 'on_hold', 'overdue', 'started')
  AND t.updated_at <= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 4320 MINUTE
  AND t.active = 1
  AND t.parent_id IS NULL

GROUP BY t.id;

SELECT
  t.id            AS task_id,
  t.title         AS task_title,
  t.description,
  t.status,
  t.priority,
  t.target_date,
  t.created_at    AS task_created_at,
  t.updated_at    AS last_updated_at,

  -- Task Owner
  rp.id           AS owner_id,
  rp.firstname    AS owner_first_name,
  rp.lastname     AS owner_last_name,
  rp.email        AS owner_email,

  -- Project
  pm.id           AS project_id,
  pm.title        AS project_title,

  -- Project Manager
  pmo.id          AS manager_id,
  pmo.firstname   AS manager_first_name,
  pmo.lastname    AS manager_last_name,
  pmo.email       AS manager_email

FROM task_managements t

JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = t.responsible_person_id

JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

JOIN spree_users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

WHERE
  t.status IN ('open', 'in_progress', 'on_hold', 'overdue', 'started')
  AND t.updated_at <= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 60 MINUTE
  AND t.active = 1;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id            AS task_id,
  t.title         AS task_title,
  t.description,
  t.status,
  t.priority,
  t.target_date,
  t.created_at    AS task_created_at,
  t.updated_at    AS last_updated_at,
  t.parent_id     AS parent_id,

  -- Task Owner
  rp.id           AS owner_id,
  rp.firstname    AS owner_first_name,
  rp.lastname     AS owner_last_name,
  rp.email        AS owner_email,

  -- Milestone (optional)
  m.id            AS milestone_id,
  m.title         AS milestone_title,

  -- Project
  pm.id           AS project_id,
  pm.title        AS project_title,

  -- Project Manager
  pmo.id          AS manager_id,
  pmo.firstname   AS manager_first_name,
  pmo.lastname    AS manager_last_name,
  pmo.email       AS manager_email,

  -- Observers (aggregated)
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.id) AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.firstname) AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.lastname) AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.email) AS observer_emails

FROM task_managements t

-- Task Owner
JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = t.responsible_person_id

-- Project
JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

-- Project Manager
JOIN spree_users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

-- Milestone (optional)
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = t.milestone_id

-- Observers
LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = t.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  t.status IN ('open', 'in_progress', 'on_hold', 'overdue', 'started')
  AND t.updated_at <= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 4320 MINUTE
  AND t.active = 1
  AND t.parent_id IS NULL

GROUP BY t.id;
